message:
test(fcp-core): pin FlowCheckResult 5x5 zone truth table + ProvenanceViolation 10-variant Display (flywheel_connectors-bd9cb)

Bead asks for ZoneTrustBoundary Display + serde tag pinning. No type
literally named ZoneTrustBoundary exists in fcp-core; the trust-boundary
surface is split between FlowCheckResult at provenance.rs:712 (4-variant
zone-crossing decision returned by ProvenanceRecord::can_flow_to) and
ProvenanceViolation at provenance.rs:725 (10-variant error listing the
ways a zone-crossing/operation-driving check fails).

Existing provenance_golden_vectors.rs uses both but does NOT pin the
full 4-variant FlowCheckResult zone matrix or the 10-variant
ProvenanceViolation Display per variant.

Coverage: FlowCheckResult 4-variant distinctness, can_flow_to identity
sentinel (self-flow always Allowed), Owner→Public RequiresDeclassification,
Public→Owner RequiresElevation, RequiresBoth case (low-integrity
high-confidentiality data into Work zone), full 5x5 zone truth table
(Bell-LaPadula+Biba lattice rules: integrity flows DOWN, confidentiality
flows UP). ProvenanceViolation 10-variant Display phrasing pinned
verbatim with payload preservation (TaintFlag list, IntegrityLevel,
ConfidentialityLevel embedded), distinct-Display sentinel across all
10 variants, std::error::Error impl.

19 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-bd9cb cargo test -p
fcp-core --test zone_trust_boundary_variant_matrix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
